title: Medical assistance program; ground ambulance transportation to alternative destination; reimbursement
doc_html:
§1131.3. Medical assistance program; ground ambulance transportation to alternative destination; reimbursement

            The department shall promulgate rules and regulations to provide for a reimbursement methodology to cover alternative destination transport by a ground ambulance service provider to ensure that reimbursement rates are reasonable and adequate.

            Acts 2018, No. 565, §2.
doc_text:
§1131.3. Medical assistance program; ground ambulance transportation to alternative
destination; reimbursement
The department shall promulgate rules and regulations to provide for a
reimbursement methodology to cover alternative destination transport by a ground
ambulance service provider to ensure that reimbursement rates are reasonable and adequate.
Acts 2018, No. 565, §2.
